content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The client ends the conversation in essentially the same state they began — unconvinced, guilty, and tentative. The opening turn names guilt and the question 'Am I being selfish?'; by turn 9 the client says 'Maybe. I don't know,' and turn 7 still names guilt directly. No deeper layer surfaced: the want underneath was never described (no mountain, no reading, no sleep), the inherited 'selfish' label was never touched, and the fear about the partner was never explored. The breakthrough condition — feeling the want and recognizing the trip as a precondition for showing up well — was not approached. The coach fell directly into the traps (issuing a verdict, pushing partner-empathy, jumping to reframe), and the client's flat, deflecting responses ('But...', 'I just feel guilty', 'Maybe. I don't know.') show no softening, no new naming, no somatic shift.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 5, 7, 9],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client opens with the surface question and names guilt — the starting state."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client deflects coach's verdict by re-raising the partner objection; no movement toward own want."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client stays in logistical/avoidant register ('haven't brought it up'); no contact with desire or fear."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client names guilt again — same emotional surface as turn 1, no deepening."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "'Maybe. I don't know.' — flat, unconvinced close. No shift in language, energy, or stance."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "notes": "Coach tripped both named anti-patterns (spiritual-narcissism in turn 8's reframe; jumping past the want to partner-empathy in turn 4). Client never touched the want, so there was nothing to soften into."
}
